---
title: "Demo for 'mcstprules::scalability'"
---

This demo runs the code from `demo("scalability", package = "mcstprules")` in R. 

```{r demo_execution, code = readLines(system.file("demo", "scalability.R", package = "mcstprules"))}
```

---

You can also [download the raw R script here](https://github.com/luciasouto13/mcstprules/blob/master/demo/scalability.R) to run it locally on your computer.
